news.headline: Hong Kong’s national security better protected with changes, experts say
news.summary:
Changes to Hong Kong’s implementation rules for the national security law will improve operational efficiency amid heightened geopolitical risks, experts have said.

news.headline: Inside the alleged Russian operation to trigger anti-government protests in Angola
news.summary: A group of Russians and Angolans are going on trial in Angola after being accused of fomenting protests, which they deny.

news.headline: Trump Delays Threat to Iran, but War Negotiations Are in Early Stage
news.summary: President Trump postponed his threat to strike power plants in Iran, citing “productive conversations” with the Iranians. But officials said the talks were in an early stage and not substantive.

news.headline: Israeli settlers vandalise school, raise Israeli flag in occupied West Bank
news.summary: Israeli settlers have been filmed vandalising a boys’ school in Huwara.

news.headline: UK universities flock to India - but will they succeed?
news.summary: Nine UK universities are setting up campuses in India, but enrolment is expected to be modest initially.

news.headline: Japan’s railways to get an earthquake early-warning upgrade
news.summary:
In earthquake-prone Japan, 20 seconds could make a difference in minimising loss of life among train passengers who experience traumatic shaking during a major seismic event.

news.headline: Trump says Iran ‘wants peace’ after US military did ‘great job’
news.summary: US President Donald Trump says ‘there’s a very good chance of a deal’ to end the US-Israel war on Iran.

news.headline: 3 Chinese EV makers raise prices – but analysts warn weak demand could force reversal
news.summary:
